name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state, N
(* Type definitions *)
(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
StateSet == {"idle", "trying", "critical"}
ProcessSet == 1..N

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Initial state *)
(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
Init ==
    /\ N \in Nat
    /\ N > 0
    /\ state \in [ProcessSet -> StateSet]
    /\ \A p \in ProcessSet : state[p] = "idle"

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Transition relation *)
(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
Next ==
    \E p \in ProcessSet :
        /\ state[p] = "idle"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "trying"]
    \/ \E p \in ProcessSet :
        /\ state[p] = "trying"
        /\ \A q \in ProcessSet : q # p => state[q] # "critical"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "critical"]
    \/ \E p \in ProcessSet :
        /\ state[p] = "critical"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "idle"]

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Invariant: at most one process in critical section *)
(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
TypeOK ==
    \A p \in ProcessSet : state[p] \in StateSet

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, N>>

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES participants, votes, state, messages, delivered
PrepareMsg(p) == <<"Prepare", p>>
VoteYesMsg(p) == <<"VoteYes", p>>
VoteNoMsg(p) == <<"VoteNo", p>>
CommitMsg == <<"Commit">>
AbortMsg == <<"Abort">>

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ participants = {1, 2, 3, 4} \* Example with 4 participants
    /\ votes = [p \in participants |-> "Pending"]
    /\ state = "Init"
    /\ messages = <<>>
    /\ delivered = {}

(* Coordinator sends Prepare to all participants *)
SendPrepare ==
    /\ state = "Init"
    /\ messages' = Append(messages, <<PrepareMsg(p) | p \in participants>>)
    /\ state' = "Prepared"
    /\ votes' = votes
    /\ delivered' = delivered

(* Participant receives Prepare and votes Yes *)
ParticipantVoteYes(p) ==
    /\ state = "Prepared"
    /\ p \in participants
    /\ messages' = Append(messages, VoteYesMsg(p))
    /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "Yes"]
    /\ state' = state
    /\ delivered' = delivered

(* Participant receives Prepare and votes No *)
ParticipantVoteNo(p) ==
    /\ state = "Prepared"
    /\ p \in participants
    /\ messages' = Append(messages, VoteNoMsg(p))
    /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "No"]
    /\ state' = state
    /\ delivered' = delivered

(* Coordinator decides to Commit if all Yes *)
CoordinatorCommit ==
    /\ state = "Prepared"
    /\ \A p \in participants: votes[p] = "Yes"
    /\ messages' = Append(messages, CommitMsg)
    /\ state' = "Committed"
    /\ votes' = votes
    /\ delivered' = delivered

(* Coordinator decides to Abort if any No *)
CoordinatorAbort ==
    /\ state = "Prepared"
    /\ \E p \in participants: votes[p] = "No"
    /\ messages' = Append(messages, AbortMsg)
    /\ state' = "Aborted"
    /\ votes' = votes
    /\ delivered' = delivered

(* Participant receives Commit and updates state *)
ParticipantCommit(p) ==
    /\ state = "Committed"
    /\ p \in participants
    /\ messages' = Append(messages, <<>>)
    /\ state' = state
    /\ votes' = votes
    /\ delivered' = delivered

(* Participant receives Abort and updates state *)
ParticipantAbort(p) ==
    /\ state = "Aborted"
    /\ p \in participants
    /\ messages' = Append(messages, <<>>)
    /\ state' = state
    /\ votes' = votes
    /\ delivered' = delivered

(* Next action *)
Next ==
    \/ SendPrepare
    \/ \E p \in participants: ParticipantVoteYes(p)
    \/ \E p \in participants: ParticipantVoteNo(p)
    \/ CoordinatorCommit
    \/ CoordinatorAbort
    \/ \E p \in participants: ParticipantCommit(p)
    \/ \E p \in participants: ParticipantAbort(p)

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ participants \subseteq Nat
    /\ votes \in [participants -> {"Yes", "No", "Pending"}]
    /\ state \in {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}
    /\ messages \in Seq(Seq(Seq(Nat \cup {"Prepare")))
    /\ delivered \subseteq messages

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, votes, state, messages, delivered>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* forks[i] = j means fork i is held by philosopher j (0..N-1),
   forks[i] = -1 means fork i is free *)
(* state[i] ∈ {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"} *)

Init ==
  /\ forks = [i \in 0..N-1 |-> -1]
  /\ state = [i \in 0..N-1 |-> "thinking"]

Next ==
  \/ \E i \in 0..N-1 :
        /\ state[i] = "thinking"
        /\ forks[i] = -1
        /\ forks[(i+1) % N] = -1
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![(i+1) % N] = i]
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
  \/ \E i \in 0..N-1 :
        /\ state[i] = "eating"
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = -1, ![(i+1) % N] = -1]
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

TypeOK ==
  /\ forks \in [0..N-1 -> Nat \cup { -1 }]
  /\ state \in [0..N-1 -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
  /\ \A i \in 0..N-1 : forks[i] = -1 \/ forks[i] \in 0..N-1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES num, flag

(* num[p] is the ticket number of process p
   flag[p] is TRUE if process p is choosing a ticket *)
num == [p \in 1..N |-> 0]
flag == [p \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

(* Helper to compute the maximum ticket number among all processes *)
maxNum == MAX { num[p] : p \in 1..N }

(* Helper to compute the next ticket number for a process p *)
nextNum(p) == maxNum + 1

(* Init action: all processes have ticket 0 and are not choosing *)
Init == /\ num = [p \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [p \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

(* Next action: a process p can either start choosing a ticket,
   finish choosing a ticket, or exit the critical section *)
Next ==
  \E p \in 1..N :
    ( (* Start choosing *)
      /\ flag[p] = FALSE
      /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![p] = TRUE]
      /\ UNCHANGED <<num>> )
    \/ ( (* Finish choosing *)
      /\ flag[p] = TRUE
      /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![p] = nextNum(p)]
      /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![p] = FALSE]
      /\ UNCHANGED <<>> )
    \/ ( (* Exit critical section *)
      /\ flag[p] = FALSE
      /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![p] = 0]
      /\ UNCHANGED <<flag>> )

(* Type checking invariant *)
TypeOK ==
  /\ num \in [p \in 1..N |-> Nat]
  /\ flag \in [p \in 1..N |-> BOOLEAN]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size, value

(* q is a sequence of length K, each element is either a value or the special symbol \bot *)
(* head and tail are indices in 0..K-1 *)
(* size is the number of elements currently in the queue *)

TypeOK == 
    /\ q \in Seq(K)
    /\ head \in 0..K-1
    /\ tail \in 0..K-1
    /\ size \in 0..K

Init == 
    /\ q = [i \in 0..K-1 |-> \bot]
    /\ head = 0
    /\ tail = 0
    /\ size = 0

ProducerAction == 
    /\ size < K
    /\ LET newTail == (tail + 1) % K
       IN /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = value]
          /\ tail' = newTail
          /\ size' = size + 1
          /\ head' = head
          /\ q = q

ConsumerAction == 
    /\ size > 0
    /\ LET newHead == (head + 1) % K
       IN /\ value' = q[head]
          /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = \bot]
          /\ head' = newHead
          /\ size' = size - 1
          /\ tail' = tail
          /\ q = q

Next == 
    ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

(* Constants *)
LeaderState == "Leader"
CandidateState == "Candidate"
FollowerState == "Follower"

(* Type checking *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ currentTerm \in Nat
  /\ votedFor \in {None} \cup Nat
  /\ state \in {LeaderState, CandidateState, FollowerState}

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
  /\ currentTerm = 0
  /\ votedFor = None
  /\ state = FollowerState

(* Transition actions *)
RequestVote ==
  /\ state = CandidateState
  /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
  /\ votedFor' = None
  /\ state' = CandidateState

VoteGranted ==
  /\ state = CandidateState
  /\ votedFor' = None
  /\ state' = CandidateState

VoteReceived ==
  /\ state = CandidateState
  /\ votedFor' = None
  /\ state' = CandidateState

BecomeLeader ==
  /\ state = CandidateState
  /\ state' = LeaderState

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
  \/ RequestVote
  \/ VoteGranted
  \/ VoteReceived
  \/ BecomeLeader

(* Variables list for the temporal operator *)
vars == <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

(* readers is a set of reader IDs currently holding the lock *)
(* writer_active is a boolean indicating whether a writer holds the lock *)

Init ==
  /\ readers = {}
  /\ writer_active = FALSE

(* Reader requests lock *)
ReaderAcquire(r) ==
  /\ r \notin readers
  /\ writer_active = FALSE
  /\ readers' = readers \cup {r}
  /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

(* Reader releases lock *)
ReaderRelease(r) ==
  /\ r \in readers
  /\ readers' = readers \ {r}
  /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

(* Writer requests lock *)
WriterAcquire ==
  /\ writer_active = FALSE
  /\ readers = {}
  /\ writer_active' = TRUE
  /\ UNCHANGED readers

(* Writer releases lock *)
WriterRelease ==
  /\ writer_active = TRUE
  /\ writer_active' = FALSE
  /\ UNCHANGED readers

Next ==
  \E r \in Nat :
    \E action \in {ReaderAcquire(r), ReaderRelease(r)} :
      action
  \/ WriterAcquire
  \/ WriterRelease

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

TypeOK ==
  /\ readers \subseteq Nat
  /\ writer_active \in BOOLEAN

====

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamportSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Channels
VARIABLES channelState, localState, markerReceived, markerSent


(* Helper definitions *)
ChannelFrom(c) == FIRST(c)
ChannelTo(c)   == SECOND(c)

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ localState = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
    /\ channelState = [c \in Channels |-> <<>>]
    /\ markerSent = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
    /\ markerReceived = [c \in Channels |-> FALSE]

(* Sending a marker on all outgoing channels of a process that has not yet sent *)
SendMarker(i) ==
    /\ ~markerSent[i]
    /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
    /\ \A c \in Channels : ChannelFrom(c) = i
          /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![c] = Append(channelState[c], "marker")]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<localState, markerReceived>>

(* Receiving a marker on a channel *)
ReceiveMarker(c) ==
    /\ ~markerReceived[c]
    /\ markerReceived' = [markerReceived EXCEPT ![c] = TRUE]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<localState, markerSent, channelState>>

(* Receiving a normal message on a channel *)
ReceiveMessage(c, msg) ==
    /\ channelState[c] = <<msg>> \* message at head
    /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![c] = Tail(channelState[c])]
    /\ localState' = [localState EXCEPT ![ChannelTo(c)] = localState[ChannelTo(c)] + 1]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<markerSent, markerReceived>>

(* Next action *)
Next ==
    \E i \in 1..N : SendMarker(i)
    \/ \E c \in Channels : ReceiveMarker(c)
    \/ \E c \in Channels : \E msg \in Nat :
          ReceiveMessage(c, msg)

(* Invariant: all markers eventually received on all channels *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : markerSent[i] \in BOOLEAN
    /\ \A c \in Channels : markerReceived[c] \in BOOLEAN
    /\ \A c \in Channels : channelState[c] \in Seq(Nat)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<localState, channelState, markerSent, markerReceived>>

====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES token

(* Type checking *)
TypeOK == token \in 1..N

(* Initial state: token starts at node 1 *)
Init == token = 1

(* Next-state relation: token moves to the next node clockwise *)
Next == 
    /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values
VARIABLES store


(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Type checking *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Initial state: all keys map to a distinguished initial value *)
Init == 
    /\ store = [k \in Keys |-> 0]   \* 0 is the initial value

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Put operation: update the value for a key *)
Put(k, v) == 
    /\ k \in Keys
    /\ v \in Values
    /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Get operation: read the current value for a key *)
Get(k) == 
    /\ k \in Keys
    /\ store' = store

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Next-state relation: either a Put or a Get *)
Next == 
    \/ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : Put(k, v)
    \/ \E k \in Keys : Get(k)

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE PaxosSingleDecree ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, ballots, promises, accepts, chosen, chosenVal
Acceptors == acceptors
Proposers == proposers
Ballot == Nat
Value == BOOLEAN

(* Helper predicates *)
IsPromise(a, b, v, bv) == 
    /\ a \in Acceptors
    /\ b \in Ballot
    /\ v \in Value
    /\ bv \in Ballot
    /\ promises[a][b] = [value |-> v, ballot |-> bv]

IsAccept(a, b, v) ==
    /\ a \in Acceptors
    /\ b \in Ballot
    /\ v \in Value
    /\ accepts[a][b] = v

IsChosen(v) == chosen[v]

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ acceptors = Acceptors
    /\ proposers = Proposers
    /\ ballots = [p \in proposers |-> 0]
    /\ promises = [a \in acceptors |-> [b \in Nat |-> [value |-> FALSE, ballot |-> 0]]]
    /\ accepts = [a \in acceptors |-> [b \in Nat |-> FALSE]]
    /\ chosen = [v \in Value |-> FALSE]
    /\ chosenVal = [v \in Value |-> FALSE]

(* Proposer actions *)
Prepare(p, b) ==
    /\ p \in proposers
    /\ b > ballots[p]
    /\ ballots' = [ballots EXCEPT ![p] = b]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<acceptors, proposers, promises, accepts, chosen, chosenVal>>

Promise(a, b, v, bv) ==
    /\ a \in acceptors
    /\ b \in Ballot
    /\ v \in Value
    /\ bv \in Ballot
    /\ promises' = [promises EXCEPT ![a][b] = [value |-> v, ballot |-> bv]]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<acceptors, proposers, ballots, accepts, chosen, chosenVal>>

Accept(a, b, v) ==
    /\ a \in acceptors
    /\ b \in Ballot
    /\ v \in Value
    /\ accepts' = [accepts EXCEPT ![a][b] = v]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<acceptors, proposers, ballots, promises, chosen, chosenVal>>

(* Chosen action: once a value is chosen, it stays chosen *)
Choose(v) ==
    /\ v \in Value
    /\ chosen' = [chosen EXCEPT ![v] = TRUE]
    /\ chosenVal' = [chosenVal EXCEPT ![v] = TRUE]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<acceptors, proposers, ballots, promises, accepts>>

(* Next action *)
Next ==
    \/ \E p \in proposers : \E b \in Ballot : Prepare(p, b)
    \/ \E a \in acceptors : \E b \in Ballot : \E v \in Value : \E bv \in Ballot : Promise(a, b, v, bv)
    \/ \E a \in acceptors : \E b \in Ballot : \E v \in Value : Accept(a, b, v)
    \/ \E v \in Value : Choose(v)

(* Invariant: once a value is chosen it never changes *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ \A v \in Value : chosen[v] => chosenVal[v]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, ballots, promises, accepts, chosen, chosenVal>>

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES
VARIABLES ackedChunks, channelLossProb, fileChunks, pendingChunk, retries, sentChunks


(* Helper constants *)
ChunkSet == {c \in 1..Len(fileChunks) |-> c}

Init ==
    /\ fileChunks = <<1, 2, 3, 4, 5>>          \* Example file split into 5 chunks
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ pendingChunk = 1
    /\ retries = 0
    /\ ackedChunks = {}
    /\ channelLossProb = 0.1

SendChunk ==
    /\ pendingChunk \in 1..Len(fileChunks)
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, pendingChunk)
    /\ pendingChunk' = pendingChunk
    /\ retries' = 0
    /\ UNCHANGED <<ackedChunks, channelLossProb>>

AckChunk ==
    /\ pendingChunk \in 1..Len(fileChunks)
    /\ pendingChunk \in ackedChunks
    /\ pendingChunk' = IF pendingChunk < Len(fileChunks) THEN pendingChunk + 1 ELSE pendingChunk
    /\ retries' = 0
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sentChunks, channelLossProb>>

Retransmit ==
    /\ pendingChunk \in 1..Len(fileChunks)
    /\ retries < MAX_RETRIES
    /\ retries' = retries + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sentChunks, pendingChunk, ackedChunks, channelLossProb>>

GiveUp ==
    /\ pendingChunk \in 1..Len(fileChunks)
    /\ retries = MAX_RETRIES
    /\ pendingChunk' = pendingChunk + 1
    /\ retries' = 0
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sentChunks, ackedChunks, channelLossProb>>

ReceiveAck ==
    /\ pendingChunk \in 1..Len(fileChunks)
    /\ pendingChunk \in ackedChunks
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sentChunks, pendingChunk, retries, channelLossProb>>

(* Non-deterministic message loss *)
MessageLoss ==
    /\ pendingChunk \in 1..Len(fileChunks)
    /\ pendingChunk \notin ackedChunks
    /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sentChunks, pendingChunk, retries, channelLossProb>>

(* Next action *)
Next ==
    \/ SendChunk
    \/ AckChunk
    \/ Retransmit
    \/ GiveUp
    \/ ReceiveAck
    \/ MessageLoss

vars == <<fileChunks, sentChunks, pendingChunk, retries, ackedChunks, channelLossProb>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK ==
    /\ fileChunks \in Seq(1..Len(fileChunks))
    /\ sentChunks \in Seq(1..Len(fileChunks))
    /\ pendingChunk \in 1..Len(fileChunks) \/ {0}
    /\ retries \in Nat
    /\ ackedChunks \in SUBSET 1..Len(fileChunks)
    /\ channelLossProb \in Real

====

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolation ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS FiniteSet, NULL

VARIABLES data, txns, nextTxId, reads, writes, status
TypeOK ==
    /\ data \in Seq(Record)
    /\ txns \in FiniteSet
    /\ nextTxId \in Nat
    /\ reads \in [txns -> FiniteSet]
    /\ writes \in [txns -> [Nat -> Record]]
    /\ status \in [txns -> {"active", "committed", "aborted"}]

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ data = <<>>
    /\ txns = {}
    /\ nextTxId = 0
    /\ reads = [t \in {} |-> {}]
    /\ writes = [t \in {} |-> [i \in {} |-> NULL]]
    /\ status = [t \in {} |-> "aborted"]

(* Transaction begin *)
BeginTxn ==
    /\ nextTxId' = nextTxId + 1
    /\ txns' = txns \cup {nextTxId}
    /\ reads' = [reads EXCEPT ![nextTxId] = {}]
    /\ writes' = [writes EXCEPT ![nextTxId] = [i \in {} |-> NULL]]
    /\ status' = [status EXCEPT ![nextTxId] = "active"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<data, txns, reads, writes, status>>

(* Read operation *)
Read(r) ==
    /\ r \in 1..Len(data)
    /\ \E t \in txns : status[t] = "active"
    /\ LET t == CHOOSE t \in txns : status[t] = "active" IN
       /\ reads' = [reads EXCEPT ![t] = reads[t] \cup {r}]
       /\ UNCHANGED <<data, txns, writes, status>>

(* Write operation *)
Write(r, v) ==
    /\ r \in 1..Len(data)
    /\ \E t \in txns : status[t] = "active"
    /\ LET t == CHOOSE t \in txns : status[t] = "active" IN
       /\ writes' = [writes EXCEPT ![t][r] = v]
       /\ UNCHANGED <<data, txns, reads, status>>

(* Commit operation *)
Commit ==
    /\ \E t \in txns : status[t] = "active"
    /\ LET t == CHOOSE t \in txns : status[t] = "active" IN
       /\ \A t2 \in txns :
            status[t2] = "active" /\ t2 # t /\ 
            (\E r \in writes[t] : writes[t][r] # NULL /\ writes[t2][r] # NULL) 
            -> status' = [status EXCEPT ![t] = "aborted"]
       /\ status' = [status EXCEPT ![t] = "committed"]
       /\ data' = [i \in 1..Len(data) |-> 
                    IF \E r \in writes[t] : r = i /\ writes[t][r] # NULL
                    THEN writes[t][i]

       /\ UNCHANGED <<txns, reads, writes>>

(* Abort operation *)
Abort ==
    /\ \E t \in txns : status[t] = "active"
    /\ LET t == CHOOSE t \in txns : status[t] = "active" IN
       /\ status' = [status EXCEPT ![t] = "aborted"]
       /\ UNCHANGED <<data, txns, reads, writes>>

(* Next action *)
Next ==
    \/ BeginTxn
    \/ Read(r)   \* r is a placeholder for a record index
    \/ Write(r, v) \* r and v are placeholders
    \/ Commit
    \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<data, txns, nextTxId, reads, writes, status>>

====

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES clocks, epsilon, node

(* Type definitions *)
ClockSet == [n \in Nat |-> Int]
Offset == Int

(* Initial state: each node starts with a distinct clock value *)
Init ==
  /\ clocks \in ClockSet
  /\ \A n \in Nat : clocks[n] = n
  /\ epsilon \in Nat
  /\ epsilon > 0

(* Drift: each node's clock may drift by an integer offset each round *)
Drift ==
  /\ \A n \in Nat : clocks'[n] = clocks[n] + Offset
  /\ Offset \in Integers

(* Synchronisation: after drift, nodes exchange clocks and set to the average *)
Sync ==
  /\ \A n \in Nat :
       clocks'[n] = ( \Sum m \in Nat : clocks[m] ) \div Cardinality(Nat)

(* Next state: drift followed by synchronisation *)
Next ==
  /\ Drift
  /\ Sync

(* Invariant: after each round, all clocks are within epsilon of each other *)
TypeOK ==
  /\ \A n, m \in Nat : Abs(clocks[n] - clocks[m]) <= epsilon

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, epsilon>>

====

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

(* flag is a sequence of two booleans, turn is an integer 0 or 1 *)

Init ==
    /\ flag = [i \in {0,1} |-> FALSE]
    /\ turn = 0

Next ==
    \/ (* Process 0 enters critical section *)
       /\ flag[0] = FALSE
       /\ flag[1] = FALSE
       /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![0] = TRUE]
       /\ turn' = 1
       /\ flag[1] = FALSE
       /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![0] = FALSE]
    \/ (* Process 1 enters critical section *)
       /\ flag[0] = FALSE
       /\ flag[1] = FALSE
       /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE]
       /\ turn' = 0
       /\ flag[0] = FALSE
       /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

TypeOK ==
    /\ flag \in [ {0,1} -> BOOLEAN ]
    /\ turn \in {0,1}

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Update

VARIABLES infected, round

(* Type definitions *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ N \in Nat
    /\ Update \in Nat
    /\ infected \in SUBSET 1..N
    /\ round \in Nat

(* Initial state: no node infected, round 0 *)
Init == 
    /\ infected = {}
    /\ round = 0

(* Helper: all nodes set *)
AllNodes == 1..N

(* Helper: a node selects a random partner to gossip with *)
SelectPartner(i) == CHOOSE j \in AllNodes : j # i

(* Next action: each round, every infected node gossips to a partner *)
Next == 
    /\ round' = round + 1
    /\ LET
           newInfected == 
               infected \cup 
               { j \in AllNodes :
                   \E i \in infected :
                       j = SelectPartner(i) }
       IN
           infected' = newInfected

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<infected, round>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Clients, Pages
VARIABLES allocated, free


(* Type checking *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ free \subseteq Pages
    /\ allocated \in [Clients -> SUBSET Pages]
    /\ \A c \in Clients: allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
    /\ \A c \in Clients: \A p \in allocated[c]: p \in Pages
    /\ \A p \in Pages: p \in free \/ \E c \in Clients: p \in allocated[c]
    /\ \A p \in Pages: \A c1 \in Clients: \A c2 \in Clients:
           (p \in allocated[c1] /\ p \in allocated[c2]) => c1 = c2

(* Initial state: all pages are free, no allocations *)
Init ==
    /\ free = Pages
    /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

(* Allocate a page to a client c *)
Allocate(c, p) ==
    /\ c \in Clients
    /\ p \in free
    /\ free' = free \ {p}
    /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

(* Release a page from a client c *)
Release(c, p) ==
    /\ c \in Clients
    /\ p \in allocated[c]
    /\ free' = free \cup {p}
    /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

(* Next action: either allocate or release *)
Next ==
    \E c \in Clients : \E p \in Pages :
        (Allocate(c, p) \/ Release(c, p))

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES subscribers, messages, inboxes
Topics == {"sports", "news", "weather"}
Subscribers == {"alice", "bob", "carol"}
Messages == {"msg1", "msg2", "msg3", "msg4", "msg5"}

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ subscribers = [t \in Topics |-> {}]
    /\ messages = [t \in Topics |-> <<>>]
    /\ inboxes = [s \in Subscribers |-> <<>>]

(* Register a subscriber to a topic *)
Register(sub, topic) ==
    /\ sub \in Subscribers
    /\ topic \in Topics
    /\ subscribers' = [subscribers EXCEPT ![topic] = subscribers[topic] \cup {sub}]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<messages, inboxes>>

(* Publish a message to a topic *)
Publish(msg, topic) ==
    /\ msg \in Messages
    /\ topic \in Topics
    /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![topic] = Append(messages[topic], msg)]
    /\ inboxes' = [inboxes EXCEPT
        \* deliver to all subscribers of this topic
        ![s] = IF s \in subscribers[topic]
                THEN Append(inboxes[s], msg)

    /\ UNCHANGED <<subscribers>>

(* Next action: any of the possible actions *)
Next ==
    \E sub \in Subscribers : \E topic \in Topics :
        Register(sub, topic)
    \/ \E msg \in Messages : \E topic \in Topics :
        Publish(msg, topic)

(* Invariant: all messages in inboxes are from the set Messages *)
TypeOK ==
    \A s \in Subscribers:
        \A i \in 1..Len(inboxes[s]) :
            inboxes[s][i] \in Messages

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscribers, messages, inboxes>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

(* turn : {0,1}  -- whose turn it is
   wants : [0..1 -> BOOLEAN]  -- whether each process wants to enter CS *)

Init ==
    /\ turn = 0
    /\ wants = [i \in 0..1 |-> FALSE]

Next ==
    (* Process 0 *)
    \/ /\ turn = 0
       /\ wants[0] = FALSE
       /\ wants[1] = FALSE
       /\ turn' = 0
       /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = TRUE]
    \/ /\ turn = 1
       /\ wants[0] = FALSE
       /\ wants[1] = FALSE
       /\ turn' = 0
       /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = TRUE]
    (* Process 1 *)
    \/ /\ turn = 1
       /\ wants[0] = FALSE
       /\ wants[1] = FALSE
       /\ turn' = 1
       /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE]
    \/ /\ turn = 0
       /\ wants[0] = FALSE
       /\ wants[1] = FALSE
       /\ turn' = 1
       /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE]
    (* Exit CS for process 0 *)
    \/ /\ wants[0] = TRUE
       /\ wants[1] = FALSE
       /\ turn' = 1
       /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = FALSE]
    (* Exit CS for process 1 *)
    \/ /\ wants[0] = FALSE
       /\ wants[1] = TRUE
       /\ turn' = 0
       /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]

TypeOK ==
    /\ turn \in {0,1}
    /\ wants \in [0..1 -> BOOLEAN]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANTS Nodes
VARIABLES counts


(* counts is a function from Nodes to a function from Nodes to Nat *)
Init ==
    /\ counts \in [Nodes -> [Nodes -> Nat]]
    /\ \A n \in Nodes: counts[n] = [m \in Nodes |-> 0]

(* Increment action for node i *)
Increment(i) ==
    /\ i \in Nodes
    /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![i][i] = @ + 1]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

(* Merge action between nodes i and j *)
Merge(i, j) ==
    /\ i \in Nodes
    /\ j \in Nodes
    /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![i] = [k \in Nodes |-> Max(counts[i][k], counts[j][k])],
                                   ![j] = [k \in Nodes |-> Max(counts[i][k], counts[j][k])]]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

(* Next action: either an increment or a merge *)
Next ==
    \E i \in Nodes: Increment(i)
    \/ \E i, j \in Nodes: Merge(i, j)

(* Total count is the sum of the maximum counts for each node *)
Total ==
    \Sum n \in Nodes: \Max_{m \in Nodes} counts[n][m]

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ counts \in [Nodes -> [Nodes -> Nat]]
    /\ \A n \in Nodes: counts[n] \in [Nodes -> Nat]
    /\ \A n, m \in Nodes: counts[n][m] \in Nat

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>

        \/ /\ state[i] = "trying"

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, participants, messages
VARIABLES coordinator, messageQueue, participantStates


vars == << coordinator, participantStates, messageQueue >>

Init == 
    /\ coordinator = "coordinator"
    /\ participantStates = [p \in participants |-> "idle"]
    /\ messageQueue = <<>>

Prepare == 
    /\ coordinator = "coordinator"
    /\ \A p \in participants: participantStates[p] = "idle"
    /\ messageQueue = <<>>
    /\ \E p \in participants: participantStates[p] = "idle"
    /\ messageQueue' = Append(messageQueue, [sender |-> "coordinator", receiver |-> p, type |-> "Prepare"])
    /\ participantStates' = [participantStates EXCEPT ![p] = "waiting"]
    /\ UNCHANGED << coordinator >>

VoteYes == 
    /\ \E p \in participants: participantStates[p] = "waiting"
    /\ messageQueue = <<[sender |-> "coordinator", receiver |-> p, type |-> "Prepare"]>>
    /\ messageQueue' = <<>>
    /\ participantStates' = [participantStates EXCEPT ![p] = "idle"]
    /\ messageQueue' = Append(messageQueue', [sender |-> p, receiver |-> "coordinator", type |-> "VoteYes"])
    /\ UNCHANGED << coordinator >>

VoteNo == 
    /\ \E p \in participants: participantStates[p] = "waiting"
    /\ messageQueue = <<[sender |-> "coordinator", receiver |-> p, type |-> "Prepare"]>>
    /\ messageQueue' = <<>>
    /\ participantStates' = [participantStates EXCEPT ![p] = "idle"]
    /\ messageQueue' = Append(messageQueue', [sender |-> p, receiver |-> "coordinator", type |-> "VoteNo"])
    /\ UNCHANGED << coordinator >>

Commit == 
    /\ \A p \in participants: participantStates[p] = "idle"
    /\ messageQueue = <<[sender |-> "coordinator", receiver |-> p, type |-> "VoteYes"]>>
    /\ messageQueue' = <<>>
    /\ participantStates' = [participantStates EXCEPT ![p] = "idle"]
    /\ messageQueue' = Append(messageQueue', [sender |-> "coordinator", receiver |-> p, type |-> "Commit"])
    /\ UNCHANGED << coordinator >>

Abort == 
    /\ \A p \in participants: participantStates[p] = "idle"
    /\ messageQueue = <<[sender |-> "coordinator", receiver |-> p, type |-> "VoteNo"]>>
    /\ messageQueue' = <<>>
    /\ participantStates' = [participantStates EXCEPT ![p] = "idle"]
    /\ messageQueue' = Append(messageQueue', [sender |-> "coordinator", receiver |-> p, type |-> "Abort"])
    /\ UNCHANGED << coordinator >>

Next == 
    /\ \E p \in participants: participantStates[p] = "idle"
    /\ messageQueue = <<>>
    /\ messageQueue' = <<>>
    /\ participantStates' = [participantStates EXCEPT ![p] = "idle"]
    /\ UNCHANGED << coordinator >>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
ASSUME N > 0

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Forks: forks[i] = i if fork i is free, otherwise forks[i] = j if philosopher j holds fork i *)
Init == forks = [i \in 0..N-1 |-> i] /\ states = [i \in 0..N-1 |-> "thinking"]

(* Helper functions *)
left(i) == (i + N - 1) MOD N
right(i) == (i + 1) MOD N

(* Actions *)
PickUp(i) == forks[i] = i /\ forks[right(i)] = right(i) /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![right(i)] = i] /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
PutDown(i) == forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![right(i)] = right(i)] /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Hungry(i) == states[i] = "thinking" /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]

Next == \E i \in 0..N-1 : (PickUp(i) \/ PutDown(i) \/ Hungry(i))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm

---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ LET maxNum == Max(Seq(num))
                newNum == IF maxNum = 0 THEN 1 ELSE maxNum + 1
            IN /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = newNum]
               /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES queue, head, tail, full, empty

vars == <<queue, head, tail, full, empty>>

Init == /\ queue = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ full = FALSE
        /\ empty = TRUE

Producer == /\ full = FALSE
           /\ queue[tail] = 0
           /\ queue' = [queue EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]
           /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
           /\ full' = IF tail' = head THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE
           /\ empty' = FALSE
           /\ head' = head

Consumer == /\ empty = FALSE
           /\ queue[head] = 1
           /\ queue' = [queue EXCEPT ![head] = 0]
           /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
           /\ empty' = IF head' = tail THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE
           /\ full' = FALSE
           /\ tail' = tail

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

---- MODULE DistributedSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES N, states, channels, snapshot, recorded, markers

        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "unrecorded"]
        /\ channels = [i, j \in 1..N |-> {}]

              /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "recorded"]
              /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![i] = "recording"]
              /\ recorded' = [recorded EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]

              /\ channels' = [channels EXCEPT !i..j = Append(channelsi..j, "marker")]
              /\ markers' = [markers EXCEPT !i..j = TRUE]
              /\ states' = states

              /\ states' = states
              /\ snapshot' = snapshot
              /\ recorded' = recorded

---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V, Ballot

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen, maxBallot, value

vars == <<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

Init == 
    /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [maxBallot -> 0, chosen -> FALSE, value -> NULL]]
    /\ proposers = [i \in 1..M |-> [maxBallot -> 0, chosen -> FALSE, value -> NULL]]
    /\ chosen = [i \in 1..N |-> [chosen -> FALSE, value -> NULL]]

Prepare(p) == 
    /\ proposers[p].maxBallot' = proposers[p].maxBallot + 1
    /\ proposers[p].chosen' = proposers[p].chosen
    /\ proposers[p].value' = proposers[p].value
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : acceptors[i].maxBallot' = acceptors[i].maxBallot
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : acceptors[i].chosen' = acceptors[i].chosen
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : acceptors[i].value' = acceptors[i].value

Promise(p) == 
    /\ proposers[p].maxBallot' = proposers[p].maxBallot
    /\ proposers[p].chosen' = proposers[p].chosen
    /\ proposers[p].value' = proposers[p].value
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : acceptors[i].maxBallot' = proposers[p].maxBallot
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : acceptors[i].chosen' = acceptors[i].chosen
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : acceptors[i].value' = acceptors[i].value

Accept(p) == 
    /\ proposers[p].maxBallot' = proposers[p].maxBallot
    /\ proposers[p].chosen' = proposers[p].chosen
    /\ proposers[p].value' = proposers[p].value
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : acceptors[i].maxBallot' = proposers[p].maxBallot
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : acceptors[i].chosen' = TRUE
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : acceptors[i].value' = proposers[p].value

Accepted(p) == 
    /\ proposers[p].maxBallot' = proposers[p].maxBallot
    /\ proposers[p].chosen' = proposers[p].chosen
    /\ proposers[p].value' = proposers[p].value
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : acceptors[i].maxBallot' = proposers[i].maxBallot
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : acceptors[i].chosen' = proposers[i].chosen
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : acceptors[i].value' = proposers[i].value

Next == 
    \E p \in 1..M : 
        \/ Prepare(p)
        \/ Promise(p)
        \/ Accept(p)
        \/ Accepted(p)

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES receiverBuffer, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ file = 0 .. FILE_SIZE - 1
    /\ chunks = [i \in 0 .. Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) - 1 |-> 

            [offset |-> i * CHUNK_SIZE + offset, data |-> 
                [offset |-> offset, data |-> [offset \in 0 .. CHUNK_SIZE - 1 |-> 

                        file[i * CHUNK_SIZE + offset + offset]

                        0]]]

            [offset |-> i * CHUNK_SIZE + offset, data |-> 
                [offset |-> offset, data |-> [offset \in 0 .. FILE_SIZE - i * CHUNK_SIZE - 1 |-> 
                    file[i * CHUNK_SIZE + offset + offset]]]]
    ]
    /\ sentChunks = {}
    /\ retransmitCount = [i \in 0 .. Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) - 1 |-> 0]
    /\ receiverBuffer = {}

Next == 
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, receiverBuffer>>
    /\ \E i \in 0 .. Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) - 1 :
        /\ i \notin sentChunks
        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks \cup {i}
        /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
    \/ \E i \in sentChunks :
        /\ retransmitCount[i] < MAX_RETRIES
        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
        /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = retransmitCount[i] + 1]
    \/ \E i \in sentChunks :
        /\ retransmitCount[i] = MAX_RETRIES
        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
        /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
    \/ \E i \in sentChunks :
        /\ receiverBuffer' = [receiverBuffer EXCEPT ![chunks[i].offset] = chunks[i].data]
        /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
        /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, receiverBuffer>>

TypeOK == 
    /\ file \in 0 .. FILE_SIZE - 1
    /\ chunks \in [0 .. Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) - 1 -> [offset |-> 0 .. CHUNK_SIZE - 1, data |-> [0 .. CHUNK_SIZE - 1 -> 0 .. 255]]]
    /\ sentChunks \subseteq 0 .. Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) - 1
    /\ retransmitCount \in [0 .. Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) - 1 -> 0 .. MAX_RETRIES]
    /\ receiverBuffer \in [0 .. FILE_SIZE - 1 -> 0 .. 255]

          /\ free' = free \ {p}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
        \/ \E c \in Client : \E p \in allocated[c] :
          /\ free' = free \cup {p}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Message, SubscriberId, TopicId

VARIABLES subscribers, messages

(* TypeOK ensures that subscribers is a function from subscriber IDs to sets of topics,
   and messages is a function from topic IDs to sequences of messages. *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ subscribers \in [SubscriberId -> SUBSET TopicId]
    /\ messages \in [TopicId -> Seq(Message)]

(* Init sets up an empty broker with no subscribers and no messages. *)
Init == 
    /\ subscribers = [s \in SubscriberId |-> {}]
    /\ messages = [t \in TopicId |-> <<>>]

(* Next describes the possible actions that can occur in the system. *)
Next == 
    \/ (* A subscriber registers interest in a topic. *)
        /\ \E s \in SubscriberId : \E t \in TopicId :
            /\ subscribers' = [subscribers EXCEPT ![s] = subscribers[s] \cup {t}]
            /\ messages' = messages
    \/ (* A publisher posts a message on a topic. *)
        /\ \E t \in TopicId : \E m \in Message :
            /\ subscribers' = subscribers
            /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![t] = Append(messages[t], m)]

(* Spec defines the behavior of the system as the initial state followed by any number of Next steps. *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscribers, messages>>

====

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn = 0
        /\ wants = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]

Next == \/ /\ wants[1] = FALSE
          /\ wants[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ wants' = wants
        \/ /\ wants[1] = FALSE
          /\ wants[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ wants[1] = TRUE
          /\ wants[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ wants[1] = TRUE
          /\ wants[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ wants' = wants

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

====

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Node

VARIABLES counts

Init == /\ counts = [n \in Node |-> [m \in Node |-> 0]]

Next == /\ \E n \in Node : \E m \in Node :
          /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n][m] = counts[n][m] + 1]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>
